items.name: Throwing Knife Pen
items.description: You look like you're about to sign this contract to give away the coveted magical super weapon, but no! You are a secret agent who has a knife disguised as a pen!  Click to remove the cap and then slash all the foes. Click and hold to charge the force of the throw when you release the knife from your hand. A hit will do 40 damage.  The secret weapon is safe... for now.
